use_cases: Animated hero section background with organic wave patterns
Abstract visual backdrop for landing pages
Ambient animated background for web applications
Transitional loading screens with flowing visuals
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered animated wave visualization component using GLSL simplex noise shaders to create organic, flowing wave patterns. Features customizable colors, shapes, and animation timing through uniform parameters. The component renders continuous fluid motion suitable for hero sections or abstract backgrounds in modern web applications.
